name: Terraform Plan Parser
description: PowerShell-based tool to parse and humanize Terraform plan output

history.description: Self-update, HTML report with info tooltips & disclaimer, and module resource type fix
changes: Added -Update switch to check for new versions on GitHub
Displays cumulative changelog between local and remote versions
Downloads and replaces script files after user confirmation
Uses parameter sets so -LogFile is only required for report mode
Added -OutputHtml parameter to generate a self-contained HTML report
HTML report includes summary cards, resource table, attribute changes, cost/security/carbon/governance insights, and executive summary
Insights are always computed for the HTML report regardless of -ShowInsights
HTML report auto-opens in the default browser after generation
Dark-themed responsive design with collapsible sections
All report sections are collapsible (Resources, Attribute Changes, Cost, Security, Carbon, Governance, Executive Summary)
Each section header includes an item count for at-a-glance overview
Executive Summary expanded by default; all other sections collapsed
Added contextual info (i) icons on each section header with hover tooltips explaining colors, symbols, and methodology
Added disclaimer in HTML report noting all insights are heuristic-based estimates, not exact calculations
Added Get-TfResourceType and Split-TfResource helper functions to correctly extract provider resource types from module-prefixed Terraform addresses
Fixed resource type extraction for module-prefixed resources (e.g., module.alz.azapi_resource.name now correctly identifies azapi_resource instead of module)
Fixed insights (cost, security, carbon) showing zeros for plans with module-prefixed resources
Fixed -Category and -ResourceType filters for module-prefixed resources
Fixed HTML and console table display to show correct ResourceType and ResourceName columns
HTML resources section is now collapsed by default with click-to-expand
Added import parsing for Terraform import blocks
Added support for more resource types
Updated documentation with the list of supported resources

history.description: Carbon footprint analysis and destroy logic fix
changes: Added carbon emission analysis with regional carbon intensity and sustainability recommendations
Fixed logic to show improvement in the report when destroying resources
Added ShowInsights switch with cost, security, and governance analysis
Added resource filtering by Category, ResourceName, and ResourceType (supports wildcards)
Added TableAll view for listing all resources
Added tags and naming convention validation (Azure CAF, AWS, GCP)
Added dedicated use cases documentation
Enhanced ShowChanges with italic formatting and color-coded diff
Fixed bug that was missing the replace scenario
Updated README with replace output example
Improved documentation for Convert-AzDevOpsLog script
Added more comments in scripts
Terraform plan parser with human-readable output
Color-coded output by action type (Create, Update, Destroy)
Convert-AzDevOpsLog script for cleaning raw log output
Summary statistics
